summary: First-finish smoke test on SpardhaHub landing MVP. Backend (4/4 endpoints) and frontend (15/17 checks) pass. Two minor findings: HTML5 type="email" intercepts invalid-email submit so the sonner error toast never fires (browser shows native tooltip instead); navbar mobile testids in code are nav-mobile-toggle/nav-mobile-menu (spec asked for mobile-menu-toggle/mobile-menu) — testid naming discrepancy only, functionality works.
passed: POST /api/signup same email twice idempotent -> same id, message 'already on the list'
POST /api/signup invalid email -> 422 with pydantic detail
Landing page loads with zero console errors
Hero headline 'Crack UPSC, MPSC, CA & More' rendered with gold gradient on key words (data-testid=hero-headline)
Subheadline contains 'Personalized roadmaps', 'Live vacancy tracker', 'AI-powered study planner'
Countdown cards UPSC/MPSC/SSC all visible with Days/Hrs/Min/Sec values rendering (2026 dates)
Stats bar contains 50L+, 9, 3, Free + labels Aspirants, Exams Covered, Languages, Forever
6 feature cards rendered with all 6 expected titles
Watch Demo CTA opens demo-modal Dialog
Hero email form submits valid email and shows success toast 'welcome to SpardhaHub!'
Closing CTA email form submits valid email and shows success toast (integration to /api/signup verified)
Navbar fixed, transparent at top, becomes opaque with backdrop-blur on scroll (class changes)
Mobile menu toggle opens menu (testids nav-mobile-toggle / nav-mobile-menu)

failed.issue: Submitting an invalid email does NOT show the sonner error toast — input has type="email" so the browser's native HTML5 validation blocks form submit before the JS handler runs. Spec asked for an error toast.
failed.evidence: Filled 'invalid-email' in hero-email-input and clicked hero-primary-cta; toasts list was empty. Code: Hero.jsx line 31 calls toast.error but is only reached after submit handler executes.

failed.issue: Spec requested data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle' and 'mobile-menu'; code uses 'nav-mobile-toggle' and 'nav-mobile-menu'. Functionality is correct, only naming differs.

action_items: Optional: change hero email input to type='text' or add noValidate to the form so the custom toast.error('Please enter a valid email address') is shown for invalid emails (current native tooltip still informs user, so non-blocking).
Optional: align Navbar testids with spec (mobile-menu-toggle / mobile-menu) or update the spec to match implementation.
